nasb.text: You have removed lover and friend far from me; My acquaintances are in darkness.

esv.text: You have caused my beloved and my friend to shun me; my companions have become darkness.

cnv.text: 你使我摯愛的和同伴都遠離我， 黑暗成了我的知己。

ccb.text: 你使我的亲朋好友离我而去， 只有黑暗与我相伴。

csbs.text: 你使我所爱的人和朋友远离我， 我的同伴只有黑暗。
